title: Evaluate Auto vs. Manual Instrumentation
description: Analyze the performance overhead and trade-offs of auto-instrumentation methods, such as bytecode manipulation. Compare the benefits and challenges of auto-instrumentation versus explicit manual span lifecycle management. Evaluate the impact of monkey-patching and other auto-instrumentation techniques in Node.js environments.
objectives: Analyze the performance overhead and trade-offs of auto-instrumentation methods, such as bytecode manipulation.
Compare the benefits and challenges of auto-instrumentation versus explicit manual span lifecycle management.
Evaluate the impact of monkey-patching and other auto-instrumentation techniques in Node.js environments.
